professionals.name: Dr. Pásztor Mariann
professionals.bio: Signed public notice about scheduled influenza vaccinations in Parasznya and Varbó; states home vaccination is available for mobility-impaired and bedridden patients during those times, and that examinations, prescriptions, and other care are not provided during vaccination slots.

sources.reason: Domain mtaki.hu has 1786 recent failed or non-actionable attempts and no useful clinic contacts.
